ELPAC Level 3
Lexile 650–1000L
DTR · TALK ABOUT A SCENE

Seventy Years Early

STS-MS7-L3-6501000-MSSS7-FFR-API-02 • MS Social Studies Grade 7 • The Reformation
Look at the picture. You will answer some questions about it. Press the play button to hear each question. Record your answer for each question. You can listen to your answer and record it again. Click SUBMIT RECORDINGS when you have answered all the questions.
JUST FOR FUN · OPTIONAL
At the Forecast Bureau, every reporter's job is to look at one invention and predict what it will change. Metal movable type was cast in Korea and used to print the Jikji in 1377, about seventy years before a press was built in Europe. Once ideas could be printed fast and cheap, a single posted list of complaints in 1517 spread across a continent in weeks instead of years. The reporters here are printing their forecasts on the same kind of machine they are writing about.
If you were a reporter in 1517, what would you predict would change first once anyone could print their ideas quickly?
Optional. You do not have to record this one.
1
What is Minji doing?
2
What is Haruto holding?
3
What is the teacher doing?
4
What place is this? How do you know?
5
Tell me about the whole forecast board.
6
What is Haruto wearing?
Record an answer for each question, then submit.
